title: Grilled Roast with Ikura and Nightshade Salsa
description: A delicious and flavorful dish that combines the richness of roast with the savory taste of ikura and the spiciness of nightshade salsa.

ingredients.name: Nightshades
ingredients.amount: 1 cup chopped tomatoes, 1/4 cup chopped red onion, 1 jalapeno pepper, 1 tablespoon olive oil

instructions: Preheat the grill to medium-high heat.
Season the roast with salt and pepper.
Grill the roast for 20-25 minutes per side, or until it reaches an internal temperature of 135°F for medium-rare.
While the roast is cooking, combine the chopped tomatoes, red onion, jalapeno pepper, and olive oil in a bowl.
Grill the ikura for 1-2 minutes per side, or until it's lightly charred.
To assemble the dish, slice the roast against the grain and serve with the ikura, nightshade salsa, and chopped fresh date.
Garnish with chopped parsley if desired.
